overall.description: A foggy nighttime walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street in Cyberpunk 2077. The camera follows a character from behind as they cross an intersection under a highway overpass, then proceed along a neon-lit sidewalk past food stalls and digital billboards. The atmosphere is dense with fog, reflecting the vibrant neon signs and street lights.

events.description: crossing the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk under the overpass

agents.ego_description: walking forward across the crosswalk beneath the overpass, following two pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction toward the opposite sidewalk
car with headlights on waiting at the intersection corner

entered.detail: large concrete highway overpass spanning the width of the intersection above
large horizontal digital billboard mounted under the overpass displaying red and white graphics
yellow painted stripes marking the pedestrian crossing on the asphalt
traffic signal pole with multiple lights at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The segment opens beneath a massive concrete overpass in a foggy urban night setting. The camera follows the character across a yellow-striped crosswalk, with digital billboards visible overhead. Sparse pedestrian traffic and a waiting car are visible through the haze as the character moves forward.

events.description: steps up onto the concrete sidewalk from the crosswalk, exiting the overpass coverage
passing under bright green and pink neon signs illuminating the foggy atmosphere

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various pedestrians and neon-lit storefronts, moving away from the intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian leaning against the building wall near a green neon sign
group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: dark concrete commercial building facade with illuminated windows and neon accents
bright green neon sign glowing on the building facade
tall street lamp cutting through the fog with bright white light

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the covered intersection onto an open sidewalk lined with concrete buildings. Bright neon signs in green and pink illuminate the foggy air. The crowd density increases slightly as the character passes pedestrians and moves deeper into the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: street vendor corridor with food stalls and vending machines

events.description: passing by brightly lit food stalls and vending machines lining the right side of the sidewalk
navigating through denser pedestrian traffic near the food vendor area

agents.ego_description: walking past food vendors and browsing pedestrians, moving through the busy sidewalk corridor

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at the blue food stall serving customers
pedestrian in red cap and jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: blue and orange food cart with illuminated menu and warm interior lighting
green and yellow vending machine with bright advertising displays
red and white striped construction barriers along the street edge

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk becomes a corridor of street commerce with food stalls and vending machines on the right. The character moves through moderate pedestrian traffic, passing vendors and neon-lit storefronts. Red and white barricades separate the walkway from the street as the fog continues to diffuse the colorful lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk approaching large vertical billboard

events.description: large vertical digital billboard with red background and Japanese text becomes prominent ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk toward the large illuminated billboard, passing fewer pedestrians in the open area

notable_agents.action: adult and child walking ahead in the same direction toward the billboard

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard with red background, white graphics, and Japanese text characters
illuminated advertising kiosk with portrait display on the sidewalk
wooden bench on the sidewalk near the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens up into a less crowded sidewalk area with a massive vertical red billboard dominating the view ahead. The character walks past a digital advertising kiosk and wooden bench, approaching the illuminated sign through the persistent fog. The wet pavement reflects the neon lights from the surrounding buildings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cavernous concrete underpass into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial district. It begins beneath a massive overpass, following a character across a yellow-striped crosswalk where digital billboards loom through a dense urban haze. As the character leaves the covered intersection, the scene opens onto a sidewalk where the gray fog is increasingly illuminated by bright green and pink neon signs. The environment then shifts into a crowded corridor of street commerce, passing food stalls and vending machines separated from the road by red and white barricades. Finally, the walkway clears as the camera moves past a digital kiosk and wooden bench toward a massive, dominating red vertical billboard reflecting off the wet pavement.
